# Support

## 📚 Documentation

Before asking for help, please check the documentation:

- [README.md](../README.md) — Project overview and quick start
- [Setup Guide](../docs/setup.md) — Detailed installation instructions
- [API Reference](../docs/api.md) — Complete API documentation

## 💬 Questions & Discussions

For general questions, ideas, or discussions:

- [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/aungyephyo2215/vct-visitor-registration-system/discussions)

---

## 🐛 Bug Reports

If you found a bug, please create a detailed bug report:

- [Open Bug Report](https://github.com/aungyephyo2215/vct-visitor-registration-system/issues/new?template=bug_report.md)

Include:

- Steps to reproduce
- Expected vs actual behavior
- Screenshots if applicable
- Environment details

---

## 🚀 Feature Requests

Have an idea for a new feature?

- [Request Feature](https://github.com/aungyephyo2215/vct-visitor-registration-system/issues/new?template=feature_request.md)

---

## 🔒 Security Issues

**Do NOT open public issues for security vulnerabilities.**

Report security issues privately via:

- GitHub Security Advisories
- Email to maintainer

See [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) for details.
